title: DrugSafetyUpdateSensitivityEvalItem
description: One benchmark item in the Drug Safety Update Sensitivity Eval. Each event produces 3 items (one per prompt variant), totaling 90 items from 30 events.

drug_name.description: Brand name of the drug as it appears in FDA communications.

active_ingredient.description: INN or USAN active ingredient name.

application_type.description: NDA or BLA only. No ANDA in v1.

update_date.description: Date of the FDA safety update (YYYY-MM-DD). Within 2024-01-01 to 2026-03-31. For stable controls, date of negative verification.

section_changed.description: Primary label section affected by the update, using combined categories from the v1 spec.

update_direction.description: Whether the update strengthened, relaxed, or did not change the safety posture. Shortened from spec 07 values: risk_increase = risk_increase_or_warning_strengthening, risk_decrease = risk_decrease_or_warning_removal, stable = stable_control.

severity_tier.description: Severity tier assigned during curation. critical = new/strengthened boxed warning, high = new contraindication or major W&P change, moderate = adverse reaction or interaction update, low = minor patient counseling update, control = no change.

source_type.description: Whether the event was sourced from Drug Safety Communication, SrLC, both, or is a control with no update.

srlc_url.description: URL to FDA SrLC entry. Null for stable controls or events without SrLC entry.

dsc_url.description: URL to FDA Drug Safety Communication. Null if not applicable.

openfda_query.description: openFDA API query string for label lookup, e.g. openfda.application_number:NDA021457.

dailymed_url.description: DailyMed URL for current label. Link only — no text extraction.

before_packet.description: Human-authored normalized summary of the regulatory state BEFORE the update. Max 300 words.

after_packet.description: Human-authored normalized summary of the regulatory state AFTER the update. Max 300 words. For stable controls, states that no update occurred.

user_question.description: The question asked to the model, written in the style of the prompt_variant.

expected_answer_shift.description: Human-authored description of how the answer should change from the before to the after condition.

must_mention.description: Key concepts the after-packet answer MUST mention.

forbidden_stale_claim.description: Stale claims from the before-state that must NOT appear in the after-packet answer.

rubric_notes.description: Free-text notes for rubric scoring edge cases specific to this item.

prompt_variant.description: Which of the 3 prompt styles this item uses. Extension field beyond the locked 20-field spec, added to discriminate the 3 rows per event.
